name: optimal-congress

metadata.name: optimal-congress
metadata.summary: CLI to find an optimal, personal schedule for the 38c3 congress.

documentation:
# Optimal Congress Command Line Interface to find an optimal, personal schedule for the [38c3 congress](https://events.ccc.de/congress/2024/infos/). ## Optimization logic The optimization relies on a simple 2-fold logic: 1. Find a personal schedule that maximizes the sum of 'rating scores' assigned to scheduled events. 2. The schedule must be feasible, i.e. the times of scheduled events must not overlap. ## Installation ```bash pip install optimal-congress ``` ## Available commands `optimal-congress` provides the following commands: ``` $ optimal-congress -h Usage: optimal-congress [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]... Optimize your personal schedule for the 37c3. ╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮ │ --verbose -v Include debug messages in output. │ │ --help -h Show this message and exit. │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ ╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮ │ dump Export all latest ratings to CSV, for bulk editing. │ │ fetch Fetch events and rooms from API, and update local cache. │ │ load Bulk import ratings from CSV. │ │ next List next upcoming events, filtered by minimum rating. │ │ optimize Optimize the schedule based on ratings. │ │ rate Interactively rate those events that have not been rated yet. │ │ ratings List all latest ratings. │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ ``` ## Example Workflow 1. Fetch events and rooms from congress API: ``` $ optimal-congress fetch Fetching events and rooms from API... Fetched 49 events and 58 rooms from API. Comparing API with cache... Found 0 new events, and 0 removed events. Updating cache... Done. ``` 2. Interactively rate events, if not already rated: ``` $ optimal-congress rate Unrated event (1/65): 2023-12-28 20:15 - 20:55 Lützerath Lebt! Einblicke in den Widerstand You can't evict a movement! Der Energiekonzern RWE wird noch Jahre brauchen, die Kohle unter Lützi abzubaggern: Der Kampf gegen die Kohle und für Klimagerechtigkeit geht weiter! https://events.ccc.de/congress/2023/hub/en/event/lutzerath_lebt_einblicke_in_den_widerstand Rate from 0 to 10 (Enter to exit): ``` 3. Review you current ratings: ``` $ optimal-congress ratings loading events and ratings from cache... Latest ratings: - Rating: 8.0 - Amateurfunk als Hilfe in Not- und Katastrophenfäll..https://events.ccc.de/congress/2023/hub/en/event/amateurfunk-als-hilfe-in-not-und-katastrophenfalle - Rating: 8.0 - InfraNodus: Reveal Non-Obvious and Find the Gaps w..https://events.ccc.de/congress/2023/hub/en/event/infranodus-reveal-non-obvious-and-find-the-gaps-wi ``` 4. Optimize your personal schedule: ``` $ optimal-congress optimize loading events, ratings, and rooms from cache... Scheduled events: - Wed 27 10:30-11:00 Saal 1..........37C3: Feierliche Eröffnung................https://events.ccc.de/congress/2023/hub/en/event/37c3_feierliche_eroffnung - Wed 27 11:00-11:40 Saal Granville..The Trouble with Green Electricity Certi..https://events.ccc.de/congress/2023/hub/en/event/the_trouble_with_green_electricity_certificates ... ``` ## Testing Software testing uses `pytest`, relying upon `poetry` and `tox`.
To run all tests, across multiple python versions: ```bash poetry run tox ``` ## Long-term Roadmap - output more/all information with associated events (see [feature request](https://github.com/top-on/optimal-congress/issues/3) and [example](https://www.willmcgugan.com/blog/tech/post/real-working-hyperlinks-in-the-terminal-with-rich/) for more compact hyperlinks with `rich`) - change rating scheme, to minimize effort and maximize flexibility (see [feature request](https://github.com/top-on/optimal-congress/issues/4)),
e.g. by first marking favorites, and only requiring relative ratings for conflicting favorites - test export of schedule to iOS app via QR code (same format as halfnarp)

modules.name: optimal_congress.io.api
documentation: Functions for read operations against congress API.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.api.fetch_events
documentation: Load events from the API.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.api.fetch_rooms
documentation: Load rooms from the API.

modules.name: optimal_congress.io.cache
documentation: IO operations on local cache.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.save_events
documentation:
Save events to cache.

Note: This function overwrites all cached events.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.save_rooms
documentation:
Save rooms to cache.

Note: This function overwrites all cached rooms.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.save_ratings
documentation:
Save ratings to cache.

Note: This does not replace cached rating for the same event.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.save_rating
documentation:
Save an individual rating to cache.

Note: This does not replace cached rating for the same event.
OPTIONAL: replace by save_ratings

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.load_events
documentation:
Load events from disk.

Args:
    exit_if_empty: Exit if no events are found, and give instructions.
Returns:
    List of events.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.load_rooms
documentation:
Load rooms from disk.

Args:
    exit_if_empty: Exit if no events are found, and give instructions.
Returns:
    List of rooms.

functions.name: optimal_congress.io.cache.load_ratings
documentation:
Load all ratings from disk.

Args:
    exit_if_empty: Exit if no ratings are found, and give instructions.
Returns:
    List of ratings.

modules.name: optimal_congress.ratings
documentation: Functions related to ratings.

functions.name: optimal_congress.ratings.filter_latest_ratings
documentation:
Return the latest rating for each event.

Args:
    ratings: List of ratings.
Returns:
    List of latest ratings.

functions.name: optimal_congress.ratings.filter_unrated_events
documentation:
Return the unrated events from a list of events based on previous ratings.

Args:
    events: list of events.
    previous_ratings: list of previous ratings.
Returns:
    List of events for which no rating is provided.

functions.name: optimal_congress.ratings.enquire_and_save_ratings
documentation: Enquire and save ratings for a list of events.

functions.name: optimal_congress.ratings.join_events_with_ratings
documentation:
Inner-Join events with ratings.

Note that duplicated ratings are not removed, if they are provided as input.

Args:
    events: Set of events.
    ratings: Set of ratings.
Returns:
    Ratings with their associated Events.

modules.name: optimal_congress.models
documentation: Model definitions.

functions.name: optimal_congress.models.events_overlap
documentation: Check if two events overlap.

classes.name: optimal_congress.models.Room

class_variables.name: optimal_congress.models.Room.Config.frozen
documentation: instances immutable and hashable
A room.

classes.name: optimal_congress.models.Event

methods.name: optimal_congress.models.Event.__hash__
documentation: Events are equal, if they have same ID - regardless of other properties.

methods.name: optimal_congress.models.Event.__eq__
documentation: Events are equal, if they have same ID - regardless of other properties.

methods.name: optimal_congress.models.Event.__str__
documentation: Return a string representation of the event.

methods.name: optimal_congress.models.Event.url
documentation: Return the url of the event.
An event.

classes.name: optimal_congress.models.Rating

class_variables.name: optimal_congress.models.Rating.Config.frozen
documentation: instances immutable and hashable
A rating for an event.

classes.name: optimal_congress.models.EventRating

class_variables.name: optimal_congress.models.EventRating.Config.frozen
documentation: instances immutable and hashable
A container class for a rating and its associated event.

classes.name: optimal_congress.models.RatingsExport
documentation: A schema for exporting and importing ratings to/from CSV.

modules.name: optimal_congress.optimize
documentation: Schedule optimization.

functions.name: optimal_congress.optimize.optimize_schedule
documentation:
Optimize the schedule of events based on ratings.

Args:
    events_ratings: Tuples of events and matching ratings.
Returns:
    Scheduled events.
Raises:
    ValueError: If no optimal solution is found.

modules.name: optimal_congress.config
documentation: App configuration.

modules.name: optimal_congress.cli
documentation: Main entry point for the 37c3 schedule optimizer.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.users_callback
documentation: Optimize your personal schedule for the 37c3.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.fetch
documentation: Fetch events and rooms from API, and update local cache.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.rate
documentation: Interactively rate those events that have not been rated yet.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.ratings
documentation: List all latest ratings.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.optimize
documentation: Optimize the schedule based on ratings.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.next
documentation: List next upcoming events, filtered by minimum rating.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.dump
documentation:
Export all latest ratings to CSV, for bulk editing.

This will exports the latest rating for each rated event.

functions.name: optimal_congress.cli.load
documentation:
Bulk import ratings from CSV.

This will overwrite existing ratings.

CSV format should be the same one as what the `dump` command exports.
